requirement: Formal evaluator score input must be trait-conditioned.
notes: Current dry-run uses existing trait-level baseline maps.

requirement: Accession-level scores must be aggregated before formal evidence evaluation.

requirement: Decoy records must be treated as matched_background only.

notes: Genome-wide unknowns are outside this dry-run matched set.

notes: Gene and QTL adapters are diagnostic only.
